creator: ports@christianserving.org
text:
Do you think so?  I was just going to go ahead and force it as a =
dependency (finally giving up).  I was about to submit the patch.  It =
does give a useful backtrace in the case of a fatal error, but other =
than that, it doesn't buy us anything.

Is there a supported/suggested way for a port to check if another port =
is already installed?  If so, I could dynamically add the dependency if =
the port is already installed and handle it as a normal option if it's =
not.
